global_description: Medium-sized bird with a rounded head, large forward-facing eyes, and a flat face. Its plumage is often mottled brown, gray, or white, providing camouflage. The body is compact with broad wings and a short tail. The beak is hooked and sharp, and the legs are feathered with sharp talons.

part_details.head: Rounded with large eyes and a flat face
part_details.eyes: Large, forward-facing, often bright yellow or orange
part_details.beak: Hooked and sharp, positioned at the front of the face
part_details.body: Compact with mottled brown, gray, or white plumage
part_details.wings: Broad and rounded, suitable for silent flight

spatial_relations: Eyes positioned on the front of the head
Beak located at the center of the face
Wings attached to the sides of the body
Legs beneath the body, extending slightly
